review_title: Extremely Versatile, Full of Bonus Features, Best All-Around Vet Software!
review_excerpt: A+ I am glad I chose Digitail as my software. I had used Woofware at VCA, Avimark, Covetrus pulse, EazyVet and Banfield's soft ware. I loved the Shepherd software interface and invoice/flow task board/medical record combining but ultimately I chose Digitail because of the client facing app, telemedicine - virtual lobby and mapping for mobile house calls. It is also very easy to document client interactions and they can also interact and request appointments through the app.
pros: I love Digitail's accessibility via tablet and phone, which is what I use the most o house calls. I also love the ability to store digital files in their cloud that owners can access via link instead of having to email huge files. I also love the client facing app where owners can access their pet's records and if traveling, other digitail vets can too.
cons: There are a few things I can not move, like the chat bot and announcement tabs. Sometimes they are in the way and I have to turn the phone sideways to get them out of they way. It should be a choice if the user wants it in the menu or easy access.
reason_for_choosing_digitail: There were many others that I am familiar with and would never choose for myself, the ones listed before and Neo and Corner stone could be added to the list.
match_notes: Created from uploaded Capterra PDF. Match to HubSpot using reviewer_name, role, location, prior PIMS, and known clinic context before adding to an advocate card.

review_excerpt: Digitail is a company that you can tell deeply cares and is passionate about what they do. They are a perfect example of how any company should run. I truly don't know how I did my job before we switched to Digitail. I actually look forward to doing my records. Crazy,right? They were so helpful in the transition from Cornerstone to Digitail, the onboarding process was seamless and anything we have hiccups with, they were very responsive and resolved our concerns quickly.
pros: I love how responsive the team is. If we have any issue, they are right there to help. Contacting customer support is never difficult and not something I dread like I do with other companies. They listen to our feedback and requests for feature updates. I also LOVE the AI dictation and Discharge Notes. My records are done as soon as the appointment is done! And the dictation almost always picks up on things that I have already completely forgotten about, which makes my records much more thorough.
cons: Our biggest issue currently is our multi-location. We have two clinics, but operate as one entity, that messes up our reminders. I can honestly say that's the only negative I have experienced, and even that is something they are willing to work with us on to improve our experience.
reason_for_choosing_digitail: Didn't really want another IDexx product. Met Digitail at a conference and they seemed great.
switched_from_note: Wanted AI, cornerstone was just outdated and weren't really trying to update.
match_notes: Created from uploaded Capterra PDF. Match to HubSpot using reviewer_name, role, location, prior PIMS, and known clinic context before adding to an advocate card.

review_excerpt: Overall, our experience with Digitail has been very positive. It supports a modern, client-centered approach to care and helps us stay organized and connected while working in the field. It’s been a strong fit for our workflow and has improved both our internal efficiency and the client experience.
pros: Digitail keeps everything streamlined and accessible, which is especially important for a mixed animal mobile practice. Scheduling, medical records, client communication, and payments all live in one place, and the interface is intuitive for both our team and our clients. The online booking and client app have made it easier for pet owners to stay connected and engaged in their pet’s care, and we’ve been able to provide clear estimates and communication without adding extra steps to our workflow. The support team has always been extremely responsive and helpful, which has made a big difference as we’ve gotten up and running.
cons: Like most platforms, there are occasional limitations with customization and certain workflows that could be more flexible, especially for a mobile or non-traditional practice model. Forms could benefit from additional customization and a more modern feel, but they are currently functional and straightforward to use.
reason_for_choosing_digitail: We chose Digitail for its customization and built-in AI capabilities. The platform allows us to tailor workflows, templates, and communication to fit our specific needs as a mobile practice, while the AI tools help streamline documentation, automate tasks, and improve efficiency across the board. This combination made it stand out compared to more traditional systems.

review_title: Digitail is perfect for the small outpatient-focused private veterinary clinic
review_excerpt: It's been great! As a small private practice, it has suited our needs wonderfully and we have been able to leverage a lot of their tools to reduce many communication friction points.
pros: - SOAPs: Logically built. Easy to start-finish every aspect of an appointment in one screen (history, exam, diagnostics, medications/label printing, invoicing, discharge instructions) - Flowboard: Quick and easy way to "bounce" between SOAPs. Visualize "who's here"? - Integrated pet smartphone app: Allows for easy sharing/viewing of records. Chat feature. Contactless booking. And pet parent medical journaling that syncs with our PIMS - Online Booking: Now they have an embeddable widget to add to our website. - Quality UX: This is a veterinary software that feels modern. And that matters when onboarding and training new staff. - Agility in development: The Digitail team has shown consistent interest in adapting to user needs.
cons: - Wish the pet parents could share their vaccination history in pdf form rather than having to contact us to do it for them. - The Whiteboard feature is a good start, but they don't have task-invoicing connectivity yet. So a big in- CS patient facility may struggle in that respect.
reason_for_choosing_digitail: Ease of use. Feedback from other users.
match_notes: Created from uploaded Capterra PDF. Match to HubSpot using reviewer_name, role, location, prior PIMS, and known clinic context before adding to an advocate card.

pros: First and foremost, the software is so easy to use and very functional. One of the great things about it is being able to access it ANYWHERE. The pet-parent portal is also genius and our clients are definitely fans! The chat function and diary updates are great for managing difficult cases. We also really like how the treatments are so easily approved and declined within a SOAP note and then anything approved will automatically pull into the invoice. It makes missing charges a thing of the past. As a brand new practice we had to start from the ground up. Our onboarding specialist, [sensitive content hidden], has been the absolute best! The fact that Digitail is constantly improving and working to be more functional is phenomenal. Honestly, there's so many nice things it would be hard to list them all but we really do just love it!
cons: There have only been a few small things I've noticed that I wasn't a fan of or feel should be worked on a bit more. The one thing I find slightly inconvenient is having to remove pricing when sending a record so instead of hitting just "send email" we have to go into the "advanced records options" every time to change it. One other thing is not being able to apply a 0 to the low end of an estimate on any product that has a dispensing fee as it will always still add the dispensing fee instead of displaying a $0 - still trying to figure a way around that without creating a bunch of new services or changing dispensing fees. The last thing I can think of that has been an issue is merging clients/patients. I've noticed after we have manually entered a client and patient into the system, if they then go enter themselves into the app it will create a duplicate and I do not have the power to merge them.
reason_for_choosing_digitail: We liked being able to access Digitail anywhere, the pet parent app, the cost being related to number of doctors within a practice vs the number of users.
match_notes: Created from uploaded Capterra PDF. Match to HubSpot using reviewer_name, role, location, prior PIMS, and known clinic context before adding to an advocate card.

review_title: It helps me keep track of charges
review_excerpt: Since using Digitail I saw that I'm always up to date with my client invoices. They also get synced with my Quickbooks account instantly and this makes my accountant's life (and mine) so much easier.
pros: I really like the easy billing and the fact that I can directly charge my clients online. I use this feature a lot, especially for telemedicine consultations or to take a downpayment for euthanasia services.
cons: It's more of a "feature" request — I'd like to be able to create different templates & designs for my invoices.
reason_for_choosing_digitail: I was plesently surprised on how fast they responded to my demo request and they remain helpful and responsive the entire journey. Also, loved how modern looking and easy to use is the platform.

pros: As a digital expert in user experience, I wanted to advise innovative and intuitive veterinary software to my wife.
